headline: Parrot Repeats Everything Owner Says, Including Her Therapy Session, Now Therapist Has A Client
summary: The parrot has started giving advice. 'Have you considered seeds?' the parrot asks.
fullBody: Megan's parrot, Polly, has learned to repeat everything she says — including her therapy sessions. Polly now offers therapeutic advice. 'Have you considered seeds?' Polly asks. 'Maybe you should fly,' Polly suggests. Megan's therapist has asked to have a session with Polly. 'She's very insightful,' the therapist said. Polly now charges $50 per session. 'Crackers accepted,' Polly said. Megan is considering giving Polly her own practice.
